description: A vertical graphic. The upper portion is a photograph of two officers in dark windbreakers lettered POLICE HSI, each with a U.S. flag patch, escorting a handcuffed man in a light blue shirt along a paved walkway, with one officer carrying a clear bag of paperwork. A blue panel in the lower left holds white text reading Making America Safe Again.
notable_text: POLICE HSI; Making America Safe Again
